name: 07-mcp-extension
description: Valid AIBOM triplet exercising the registered `mcp` adapter namespace with two extension capability ids (mcp:resource:expose, mcp:tool:call) and freeform qualifiers.
notes: Demonstrates the registered-adapter-namespace grammar from ADR-0005. Qualifier keys (resource_uri_pattern, tool_name) are freeform under the mcp namespace — schema does not enforce them. Extension capabilities do not contribute to delta findings; Policy #11 (no-unknown-extension-capability) evaluates 'allowed' for mcp: entries when mcp is in the consumer's extension-namespace allowlist (default in v0.1).
